description: A 14-cup capacity food processor with 720-watt motor, stainless steel blade, and multiple disc attachments for slicing, shredding, and chopping. Includes a BPA-free work bowl and dishwasher-safe parts.
Neutral road-running shoes with DNA LOFT cushioning, engineered mesh upper for breathability, and segmented crash pad for smooth heel-to-toe transitions. Available in men's and women's sizing.
A 20-liter everyday backpack with a padded laptop sleeve fitting up to 15-inch laptops, mesh-covered back panel for ventilation, and external stretch mesh pockets. Weighs 0.6 kg.

Award-winning strategy board game for 3 to 4 players. Players collect and trade resources to build settlements, cities, and roads on the island of Catan. Average play time 60 to 90 minutes. Ages 10 and up.

An ergonomic wireless mouse with 8K DPI optical sensor, quiet click mechanism, MagSpeed electromagnetic scroll wheel, and USB-C rechargeable battery lasting up to 70 days. Connects via Bluetooth or included USB receiver.
